persona.label: frustrated business owner
persona.voice: owner who is tired of guessing why AI tools ignore their brand
persona.pacing: sharp hook, one breath, then slower problem-solution read

topic.pain: Startups can publish fast, but they rarely know if AI systems can explain what they do.
topic.promise: CiteLens shows which prompt paths and citation gaps deserve attention first.
topic.proofPoint: A weekly task beats another dashboard tab nobody opens.
topic.callToAction: Try the workflow on one product page this week.

hook: Nothing is more annoying than seeing AI recommend everyone except you.
adCopy: Nothing is more annoying than seeing AI recommend everyone except you. Startups can publish fast, but they rarely know if AI systems can explain what they do. CiteLens shows which prompt paths and citation gaps deserve attention first. A weekly task beats another dashboard tab nobody opens. Try the workflow on one product page this week.
voiceoverScript:
Nothing is more annoying than seeing AI recommend everyone except you.

Startups can publish fast, but they rarely know if AI systems can explain what they do.

That is the whole reason CiteLens exists. CiteLens shows which prompt paths and citation gaps deserve attention first.
A weekly task beats another dashboard tab nobody opens.

Try the workflow on one product page this week.
captionText:
Nothing is more annoying than seeing AI recommend everyone except you
Startups can publish fast, but they rarely know if AI systems can explain what they do.
CiteLens shows which prompt paths and citation gaps deserve attention first.
One gap. One fix. One page to improve.
Try the workflow on one product page this week.

shotList.framing: handheld selfie, face close to camera
shotList.action: deliver the hook without a cut; slight pause at the end
shotList.caption: Nothing is more annoying than seeing AI recommend everyone except you
shotList.notes: strong first beat, no intro animation

shotList.framing: screen recording or laptop over shoulder
shotList.action: show a prompt or search result where the brand is missing
shotList.caption: Startups can publish fast, but they rarely know if AI systems can explain what they do.
shotList.notes: hold long enough to read; avoid jump cuts

shotList.framing: creator back on camera with screen visible
shotList.action: explain what CiteLens turns the gap into
shotList.caption: CiteLens shows which prompt paths and citation gaps deserve attention first.
shotList.notes: calm middle section; let the voice breathe

shotList.framing: simple UI mock or checklist card
shotList.action: show one task: rewrite a section, add proof, clarify category, or compare competitors
shotList.caption: One gap -> one fix

shotList.action: give the CTA like a real founder asking for feedback
shotList.caption: Try the workflow on one product page this week.
